name: Chocolate Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cake:
a. Combine flour, salt, sugar, and baking powder together in a bowl.
b. Add milk and mix until well combined.
c. Melt chocolate and butter separately in another dish.
d. Allow the melted chocolate mixture to cool slightly before adding it to the cake batter.
e. Mix well and pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13 pan.
3. Sauce:
a. In a separate bowl, combine sugar, brown sugar, and cocoa until well mixed.
b. Sprinkle the sauce mixture over the top of the cake batter.
c. Carefully pour boiling water over the sauce.
4. Bake for 40 minutes.
5. Serve warm plain or with ice cream or whipped cream.
